originalTitle: Cartoonist freed after 15 years in prison without charge in Eritrea
title: Cartoonist freed after 15 years in prison without charge in Eritrea
content: Biniam Solomon was known for his witty and critical cartoons before the free press was closed.

originalTitle: Death toll from Ethiopia floods and landslides rises to more than 100
title: Death toll from Ethiopia floods and landslides rises to more than 100
content: Forecasters say storms are becoming more intense in the region, partly due to global warming.

title: Senegal approves tougher anti-gay law as rights groups raise concerns
content: "Violence and fear" will spike and "equality and non-discrimination" will be trampled on, warn critics.

title: Trump says not ‘appropriate’ for Iran to participate in the World Cup in US
content: US president, who won the FIFA Peace Prize says Iran would be welcome but should not come for its players' safety.

title: Iran’s president sets terms to end the war: Is an off-ramp in sight?
content: Iran is asking for 'reparations' and a guarantee that the US and Israel will not attack in the future.

title: US military ‘not ready’ to escort oil ships through Hormuz, official says
content: Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei says strait should remain closed as Donald Trump claims US benefits from high oil prices.

title: 'What if we're left with ruins?': Doubts creep in for Iranians who supported war
content: Teachers, engineers and shopkeepers tell the BBC they fear Iran falling into chaos.

originalTitle: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah's party wins Nepal election
title: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah's party wins Nepal election
content: The Rastriya Swatatantra Party has won a large majority in an election dominated by issues including corruption.

originalTitle: China approves 'ethnic unity' law requiring minorities to learn Mandarin
title: China approves 'ethnic unity' law requiring minorities to learn Mandarin
content: The law states that children should be taught Mandarin before kindergarten, until the end of high school.

title: 'Not appropriate' for Iran to be at World Cup - Trump
content: US president Donald Trump says Iran are "welcome" at the 2026 World Cup but it is not "appropriate" for them to be there.

content: Phil McNulty examines the state of the Premier League after none of its six Champions League entrants won this week.

title: Sutton's predictions v YouTuber Angry Ginge
